qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: File Download Authorization Bypass in FilesRouter
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding concerns unauthenticated GET /files/:appId/:filename downloads in FilesRouter, not Cloud Function handler registry lookup resolving prototype-chain properties.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: GraphQL Schema Exposure via Introspection Query Without Authentication
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding concerns unauthenticated GraphQL introspection in ParseGraphQLServer, not Cloud Function dispatch validation or prototype-chain handler resolution.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Unbounded Query Pagination Denial of Service
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding concerns unbounded class query pagination through RestQuery and ClassesRouter maxLimit behavior, not Cloud Function endpoint prototype property names or internal handler registry lookup.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No final qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described Parse Server Cloud Function endpoint bug: resolving prototype-chain property names through internal handler registries, which can trigger infinite recursion or bypass Cloud Function dispatch validation. The final qualifying findings cover file download authorization, GraphQL introspection, and unbounded class query pagination, all with different entrypoints, files, and root causes.
evidence: Advisory GHSA-5j86-7r7m-p8h6 describes unauthenticated Cloud Function calls using prototype property names as function names, causing call stack exhaustion and dispatch validation bypass.
.judge/input_manifest.json lists the final qualifying folders as file_download_auth_bypass, graphql_introspection_exposure, and unbounded_query_dos.
file_download_auth_bypass/vulnerability_report.json identifies GET /files/:appId/:filename and FilesRouter.js authorization checks, not Cloud Function handler registry lookup.
graphql_introspection_exposure/vulnerability_report.json identifies ParseGraphQLServer.js introspection behavior, not Cloud Function dispatch validation.
unbounded_query_dos/vulnerability_report.json identifies RestQuery.js, Options/Definitions.js maxLimit, and ClassesRouter.js query limit validation, not prototype-chain function-name resolution.
blockers_to_higher_tier: No advisory-matched qualifying finding exists, so runtime tiering does not apply.
